summary: Comprehensive testing completed for OEC Tech Institute e-learning platform after brand rename and feature updates. All core features tested including brand name changes, 3D hero image with floating badges, enhanced checkout flow with fee receipt upload, and enhanced animations. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 98% functional with excellent integration.

design_issues.issue: No clear success message displayed after form submission, only validation errors shown

passed_tests: Brand name 'OEC Tech Institute' correctly displayed in header, footer, about page, and homepage
Old brand name 'Hussnain Digital Academy' completely removed from all pages
Hero section displays 3D animated image on right side with floating badges
Floating badges show 'Earning Potential $500-$2000/mo' and 'Students from 4 Countries'
Homepage loads with all sections: hero, featured courses, benefits, reviews, diploma tracks, CTA, FAQ
All 7 courses load correctly on courses page with proper information
Course search functionality works (tested with 'Social Media' filter)
Category filter buttons work correctly (All, Technology, Design, Marketing, E-Commerce, Web Development)
Reviews page loads with multiple testimonials and star ratings
About page shows updated brand name throughout content
Contact form has proper validation and structure
Fee receipt upload feature implemented in checkout flow
Payment methods (JazzCash, EasyPaisa, Bank Transfer) properly MOCKED
All backend API endpoints return correct data (courses, reviews, diploma tracks)
Contact form submission API works correctly
Authentication system properly secures protected endpoints
Enhanced animations throughout site using framer-motion working correctly
